signals.title: Breez lanceert Bitcoin-naar-stablecoin-betalingen op meer dan 30 blockchains
signals.summary: The new SDK feature lets developers route payments from Bitcoin balances to recipients in USDC and USDT without requiring users to hold stablecoins.

signals.title: EBA publiceert ontwerpmethodologie voor boeterollen onder MiCA
signals.summary: ​The European Banking Authority (EBA) published today a Consultation Paper with a draft methodology for setting fines in its role as supervisor under MiCA. The objective is to ensure that fines imposed on issuers of significant crypto-assets are consistent, proportionate and transparent, and effectively support compliance with the regulatory framework.

signals.title: BlackRock voegt uitgebreide ondersteuning voor Ethena-stablecoins aan Aladdin toe
signals.summary: The move makes USDe more accessible to investment professionals wishing to take advantage of 'digital dollar exposure.'

signals.title: Duitsland voert MiCA-vergunningen in EU aan voor 1 juli
signals.summary: MiCA crypto licensing data shows 244 approved companies across EU and EEA jurisdictions, led by Germany with France and the Netherlands also among top hubs ahead of July 1 cliff.

signals.title: Ongelicentieerde cryptobedrijven in Europa moeten voldoen aan MiCA-deadline
signals.summary: Europe’s unlicensed crypto firms face ‘wipeout’ as MiCA deadline hits

signals.title: EBA publiceert routekaart voor implementatie herziene Depositogarantierichtlijn
signals.summary: The European Banking Authority (EBA) today published a roadmap outlining how it will deliver its mandates under the revised Deposit Guarantee Schemes Directive (DGSD3). The roadmap sets out the EBA’s role in implementing DGSD3 by developing a set of regulatory products to strengthen depositor protection across the EU. It also presents the timeline for these deliverables, which will ensure depositors are better informed about their rights, better protected, and that deposit guarantee schemes are prepared to act when needed.

signals.title: USDT-premie in India stijgt naar 8.5% na crackdown stablecoin
signals.summary: India's USDT premium topped 8.5% after Enforcement Directorate raids on Bengaluru crypto firms reportedly disrupted stablecoin supply.

signals.title: Nieuwe MiCA-regelgeving in Europa en Amerikaanse arbeidsmarktgegevens volgende week
signals.summary: New MiCA regime in Europe, U.S. jobs report for June: Crypto Week Ahead
